examples: This finding is similar to observations in Thailand, where a seawall at Patong Beach caused a splash-up of the tsunami wave.
I was put in a suite overlooking the seawall.
Don't miss the Seawall cafe, one block up from the state beach.
Seawall: massive structure built along the shore to prevent erosion and damage by wave action.
Weep hole: hole through a solid revetment, bulkhead or seawall for relieving water pressure.
